_schema: MESSAGE_BOARD v2 — rebuilt 2026-03-11 session 146. Max 20 messages. Prune oldest on overflow.

messages.message: LISTING FACTORY SPEC COMPLETE — #27. Phased 3-sprint spec at claude_docs/feature-notes/listing-factory-spec.md. SPRINT 1: AI tag suggestion (modify processRapidDraft to map Vision labels → CURATED_TAGS via Haiku), tag picker UI in review.tsx, Listing Health Score utility (computed, no schema change), health bar in review.tsx. No migration. SPRINT 2: Cloudinary watermark utility, exportController.ts (3 formats: estateSalesNet CSV, facebook JSON, craigslist text), social template endpoint (3 tones × 2 platforms), promote.tsx UI. No migration. SPRINT 3: /tags/[slug] ISR pages, /api/tags/popular endpoint, sitemap update. Optional: #64 Condition Grading (additive migration 20260315_add_condition_grade_to_item) + #31 Brand Kit (additive migration 20260315_add_brand_kit_to_organizer). Files changed: claude_docs/feature-notes/listing-factory-spec.md (created). Patrick decisions flagged in spec — see 'Flagged for Patrick' section.

SESSION 162 WRAP COMPLETE. Comprehensive Review & Publish page rebuild + Chrome audit + P1 bug fixes. Inline edit panel upgraded from 3 fields to full feature parity with edit-item page: ItemPhotoManager, description, condition, quantity, PriceSuggestion, per-item Publish/Unpublish toggle, Full Edit Page link. draftStatus badge added to item cards (Published/Pending/Draft). Chrome audit all 7 checks passed. Two P1 bugs fixed: (1) unicode separator `·` rendering as literal text (fixed with `{' · '}`), (2) Manual Entry items showing "Low (50%)" instead of "Manual" (fixed via `isAiTagged` field check). Backend updated: isAiTagged + aiConfidence added to getDraftItemsBySaleId and getItemDraftStatus selects. Merge conflict in review.tsx resolved (kept HEAD). CORE.md updated with §3 rule: re-read §4 Push Rules after compression. Files changed: packages/frontend/pages/organizer/add-items/[saleId]/review.tsx, packages/backend/src/controllers/itemController.ts, claude_docs/CORE.md. All on GitHub main, Vercel auto-deploying. STATE.md, session-log.md, next-session-prompt.md updated. Ready for next session.
REVIEW & PUBLISH PAGE JSX WIRED — COMPLETE.
SESSION 162 WRAP COMPLETE (Chrome audit + P1 bugs).
96-HOUR SESSION I/O CAPTURE SYSTEM — DESIGN ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Awaiting Patrick greenlight for Phase 1 build.
